queries.question: Show all buffets open between 7:30 am and 4:00pm, also show the coffee shops open during the same time.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurant.name 
FROM Restaurant
WHERE (Restaurant.Service_format = "Buffet" OR Restaurant.Service_format = "Coffee Shop") AND Restaurant.Hours = "7.30 a.m. - 4 p.m."
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?restaurant a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurant p:name ?name .
  ?restaurant p:Service_format ?service_format_w .
  ?restaurant p:Service_format ?service_format_w2 .
  ?restaurant p:Hours ?hours_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?service_format_w) = "Buffet" || STR(?service_format_w2) = "Coffee Shop")) && STR(?hours_w) = "7.30 a.m. - 4 p.m."))
}

queries.question: Show all the buffets in the data, also show just the coffee shops open from 7:30am to 4:00pm.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurant.name 
FROM Restaurant
WHERE Restaurant.Service_format = "Buffet" OR Restaurant.Service_format = "Coffee Shop" AND Restaurant.Hours = "7.30 a.m. - 4 p.m."
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?restaurant a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurant p:name ?name .
  ?restaurant p:Service_format ?service_format_w .
  ?restaurant p:Service_format ?service_format_w2 .
  ?restaurant p:Hours ?hours_w .
  FILTER((STR(?service_format_w) = "Buffet" || (STR(?service_format_w2) = "Coffee Shop" && STR(?hours_w) = "7.30 a.m. - 4 p.m.")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all buffets and coffee shops open from 7:30am to 4:00pm.
